form.formComment: Has struggled of late. Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 2080m at Cranbourne beaten 24 m by Liberty Star Dust (2:36.50) in MAIDEN on March 29 at $61. At the previous start 5th (Fr3) over 2080m at Cranbourne, at the bell was 4th-9.8 beaten 13 m by Weona Our Rights (2:38.00) in MAIDEN on February 22 at $26. Has the inside draw which may spark a revival.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr6) over 2200m at this track, at the bell was 7th-15.66 beaten 17 m by Onyx (2:44.40) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 5 at $151. Two runs back 6th (Sr2) over 2080m at Cranbourne beaten 30 m by Weona Our Rights (2:38.00) in MAIDEN on February 22 at $51. Wait until the form picks up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped during the early stages of the score up on two occasions.
Inconvenienced in the back straight on the final occasion.
Galloped clear of interference after the start. Then trailed the field.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth behind Lazenby at Kilmore over 2690m in a 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 26 at $8.50. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1650m after showing early pace at Bendigo was leading by 1.79 at the bell, beaten a head by Crocodile Blood (1:59.70) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 18 at $10. Contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position when the start was effected. Pulled hard in running.
Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 69.6m.

form.formComment: Solid run when a close third behind Crocodile Blood at Bendigo over 1650m in a 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 18 at $14. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Lazenby at Kilmore over 2690m in a 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 26 at $6.50. Can maintain the strong form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten some distance.
Hampered passing the 1100m when Phurhpy broke gait on a second occasion.
Shifted ground at the 300m, inconveniencing Im The Reason.
Inconvenienced in the score up by My Ultimate Luigi.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 2180m at Terang, beaten 21 m by Keayang Dreamgirl (2:42.40) in MAIDEN on March 27 at $81. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr1) over 2195m after showing early speed at Ararat beaten 40 m by Steam Machine (2:41.40) in 0-1 WIN on March 23 at $11. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Returns after seven months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into eighth behind Miki Sing at this track over 2200m in a 3yo MAIDEN on September 4 at $12. Market watch fresh.
